response_text:
1. Verdict agreement

我不同意无条件 PASS。更合适的判断是：CONDITIONAL_APPROVE。

报告显示 CDP Write Adapter、Review Dispatcher、Agent-facing API 三个模块已经完成初步实现，并且测试规模看起来很充分：30 个 CDP-specific tests，full regression 1374 passed，pre-commit gate 4 stages PASS。方向上是积极的。

但是，这份报告自己也承认：

Remaining Work:
- Real multi-GPT review execution (user-controlled trigger)
- CAP-030 status promotion from "proposed" to "verified" after successful live review cycle

这说明当前还不能称为完整 execution-layer PASS。更准确地说，它是 implementation-level pass with limitations，不是 production execution pass。

2. Evidence sufficiency

证据不足以支持无条件 PASS。

报告提供的是 narrative summary，而不是 raw evidence。缺少以下关键证据：

YAML
missing_raw_evidence:
  - CDP live test 原始 stdout/stderr
  - full regression 原始 pytest 输出
  - pre-commit governance gate 原始日志
  - Chrome target list / target IDs / tab titles
  - review dispatch transcript 或 DOM capture
  - send_for_review / capture_review_response 的真实输出样本
  - human authorization record
  - evidence directory contents and hashes
  - git diff / git status / write_set compliance evidence

尤其是报告声称：

All tests were run against a live Chrome 149 instance with real ChatGPT tabs.

这属于高风险外部 runtime 操作。仅凭一句声明不足以证明它是 authorized、target-bound、可回滚、未误发、未越界、未污染用户会话。

3. Gap identification
Gap 1：CAP-030 仍是 proposed，却被用来支撑 PASS

报告说：

CAP-030: CDP Write Adapter
Status: proposed
Passport: verified
Risk: high

如果 capability 仍是 proposed，它不能被当作稳定能力用于正向生产 readiness 证明。至少需要说明：

YAML
capability_boundary:
  proposed: allowed_for_tests_only
  verified: allowed_for controlled pilot after human authorization
  production: not yet approved

否则会出现“能力还未正式注册完成，但执行层已经 PASS”的治理错位。

Gap 2：真实 multi-GPT review execution 尚未完成

报告的核心目标是让 agents 将报告发送到独立 GPT browser sessions 做 review。但剩余工作第一项就是：

Real multi-GPT review execution (user-controlled trigger)

这意味着目前最多证明了 adapter/API 可以工作，不能证明完整 review-dispatch workflow 已经成功闭环。

Gap 3：缺少 human authorization / authority boundary 证据

CDP 操作 ChatGPT tabs 属于外部 runtime 自动化。报告没有提供：

YAML
missing_authorization:
  - who authorized live CDP write tests
  - exact run_id
  - allowed target tabs
  - allowed message contents
  - expected write_set / runtime side effects
  - rollback / stop condition

在这个项目的治理语境中，这是 P1 级缺口。

Gap 4：目标绑定不清

CDP write adapter 最容易出问题的是“写错 tab / 写错 conversation”。报告没有证明：

YAML
target_binding_checks:
  - target_id matched intended reviewer
  - tab URL matched expected ChatGPT conversation
  - conversation title / session identity checked
  - stale target rejected
  - wrong tab rejected
  - duplicate ChatGPT tabs handled safely

如果没有这些，live CDP automation 的 fake-green 风险仍然存在。

Gap 5：没有 transcript-level evidence

报告说能发送和捕获 response，但没有提供：

YAML
review_delivery_evidence:
  - prompt actually inserted
  - message actually sent
  - assistant response actually captured
  - response belongs to intended target tab
  - response timestamp
  - evidence file path
  - response hash

这使得“review dispatcher 实际可用”的结论还不能独立复核。

4. Risk flags

我认为至少有以下 P1 风险需要保留。

P1：Live CDP execution without attached authorization evidence

报告明确说 live Chrome / real ChatGPT tabs 已经参与测试，但没有附 human authorization evidence。这在本项目中不能被视为普通测试缺口，而是 authority-boundary 风险。

P1：CAP-030 proposed status conflicts with execution PASS

能力仍是 proposed，却已经进行 live integration tests 并给 execution layer PASS。除非有明确“proposed capability may run under controlled test authorization”的规则，否则这里存在治理不一致。

P1：wrong-tab / wrong-session protection 未被证明

CDP 写入的最大风险是目标误绑定。报告没有证明 target identity validation、conversation binding validation、stale tab rejection、duplicate tab handling。这个风险可能导致消息发送到错误会话。

P1：real review-dispatch workflow 未闭环

既然真实 multi-GPT review execution 仍是 remaining work，那么不能说 execution layer 完成 PASS。最多是 adapter/API unit + integration readiness conditional pass。

P2：response capture 可靠性未充分证明

轮询 [data-message-author-role="assistant"] DOM nodes 可能受到 ChatGPT UI 变化、多 assistant messages、历史消息、streaming 状态影响。报告没有说明如何区分本次 response 与历史 response。

5. Overall assessment

CONDITIONAL_APPROVE

我的独立判断是：

YAML
overall_assessment: CONDITIONAL_APPROVE
agree_with_agent_verdict: no
agent_verdict: PASS
independent_verdict: CONDITIONAL_APPROVE
reason:
  - implementation direction is sound
  - adapter / dispatcher / API appear to be built
  - tests are reported as passing
  - but raw evidence is insufficient
  - live CDP execution lacks attached authorization and target-binding evidence
  - CAP-030 remains proposed
  - real multi-GPT review execution remains unfinished
  - therefore PASS is too strong
required_before_full_approve:
  - attach raw CDP integration test logs
  - attach full pytest and pre-commit gate outputs
  - provide human authorization record for live CDP testing
  - provide target binding evidence for each ChatGPT tab
  - provide transcript-level evidence of one real review dispatch and response capture
  - prove wrong-tab / stale-target / duplicate-tab rejection
  - clarify CAP-030 status and allowed execution boundary
  - update documentation so CDP sessions are explicitly review seats, not execution seats
final_assessment: CONDITIONAL_APPROVE

一句话结论：这份报告可以支持“CDP review delivery layer 已初步实现并通过本地/部分 live 测试”，但不能支持无条件 PASS；在缺少授权、目标绑定和真实 review 闭环证据前，只能条件性通过。
